summary: Comprehensive testing of pricing refactor features. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All key features verified via Playwright. Admin product form new fields, all pricing types, VariantEditor/PriceInputsEditor, store pricing labels, product detail variant selector, and prod_migrate_books removal all confirmed working.

issues: card_description DOES NOT override short_description on catalog card. OfferingCard.tsx line 77 uses `product.short_description || product.card_description` - short_description takes priority over card_description. Admin intent is for card_description to override. Fix: swap order to `product.card_description || product.short_description || product.tagline`

card_tag DOES NOT override tag on catalog card. formatTag() in OfferingCard.tsx checks `product.tag` before `product.card_tag`. Fix: check card_tag first: `if (product.card_tag) return product.card_tag; if (product.tag) return product.tag;`
Fixed-price products show 'from $X' label instead of '$X'. Test spec expected '$X' for fixed pricing. Minor cosmetic issue. Current label is 'from $X' for non-subscription, '$X/mo' for subscription.

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login works with admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!
Backend: prod_migrate_books product does NOT exist
Backend: Create fixed product with all new fields (card_title, tagline, card_tag, card_description, card_bullets) - all persisted correctly
Backend: Create tiered product with variants [Starter=$99, Professional=$299] - pricing_rules.variants stored correctly
Backend: Tiered product builds price_inputs automatically for frontend
Backend: Create calculator product with price_inputs (number and select inputs)
Backend: Calculator number input stores min, default, price_per_unit correctly
Backend: Create scope_request, inquiry, external pricing types all work
Backend: Update product with new fields (card_title, tagline, pricing_type, variants) persists correctly
Backend: Public products endpoint returns products
Backend: prod_migrate_books NOT visible on public store
Backend: Price calculation for tiered (basic variant=$99) works via /api/products/{id}/calculate-price
Backend: Price calculation for calculator (100 base + 3 users × 50 = $250) works
Frontend: Admin login redirects to /admin
Frontend: Catalog tab loads 65+ products
Frontend: New Product dialog opens via '+ New Product' button
Frontend: All 4 tabs present: General, Pricing, Intake Questions, Page Content
Frontend: General tab has tagline, card_title, card_tag, card_description fields with data-testid
Frontend: Pricing tab has Pricing Type dropdown with all 6 options: fixed, tiered, calculator, scope_request, inquiry, external
Frontend: Selecting 'Tiered' shows VariantEditor with 'Add variant' button
Frontend: VariantEditor allows adding variants with label and price
Frontend: Selecting 'Calculator' shows PriceInputsEditor with 'Number' and 'Select' buttons
Frontend: Calculator also shows Base Price (starting/minimum) field
Frontend: PriceInputsEditor number input has min, max, step, default, $ per unit fields
Frontend: PriceInputsEditor select input has option label, multiplier, flat, RFQ fields
Frontend: Creating product (tiered with 2 variants) via UI shows 'Product created' success toast
Frontend: Dialog closes after successful save
Frontend: Store CRM category shows TEST_Tiered_Product with 'Starts from $99' (cheapest variant)
Frontend: Store CRM category shows TEST_Calculator_Product with 'Starts from $225' (base=100 + 5×25)
Frontend: Store CRM category shows TEST_Calculator_StartPrice with 'Starts from $300' (base=200 + 2×50)
Frontend: Store CRM category shows TEST_ScopeRequest_Product with 'Contact us'
Frontend: Fixed product (Test Card Title, $299) shows 'from $299' on store card
Frontend: card_title override 'Test Card Title' shown on store card (instead of product.name)
Frontend: card_bullets ['Bullet A', 'Bullet B', 'Bullet C'] shown on store card
Frontend: Zoho Books Express Setup shows 'Starts from $999' on store (tiered pricing with variants)
Frontend: Zoho Books product detail page has variant selector 'Select option' dropdown
Frontend: Product detail page has 'Add to cart' button
Frontend: No BooksMigrationForm component in product detail page source or DOM
Frontend: No 'Migrate to Zoho Books Migration Form' text in page source
action_items: MINOR: Fix OfferingCard.tsx line 77 - swap order to use card_description as primary override: `product.card_description || product.short_description || product.tagline`
MINOR: Fix OfferingCard.tsx formatTag() - check card_tag before tag for proper override behavior: `if (product.card_tag) return product.card_tag; if (product.tag) return product.tag;`
COSMETIC: Decide if fixed-price label should be '$X' (as spec says) or 'from $X' (current implementation)
critical_code_review_comments: OfferingCard.tsx line 77: `const description = product.short_description || product.card_description || product.tagline;` - card_description is an 'override' field but is currently used as fallback, not override. Should be: `product.card_description || product.short_description || product.tagline`
OfferingCard.tsx formatTag: card_tag should take priority over tag (it's the catalog card override), but current order is tag > card_tag

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all core features verified; 2 minor card override field ordering issues)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed products in CRM/Finance categories: TEST_Fixed_Product_Refactor, TEST_Fixed_Persistence, TEST_Tiered_Product, TEST_Tiered_StartPrice, TEST_Calculator_Product, TEST_Calculator_StartPrice, TEST_ScopeRequest_Product, TEST_Inquiry_Product, TEST_External_Product, TEST_Update_Base, TEST_Store_Fixed. UI test created 'UI Test Tiered Product'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pricing refactor fully tested and working. Key features all pass: (1) Admin product form has 4 tabs (General/Pricing/Intake Questions/Page Content), tagline/card_title/card_tag/card_description/card_bullets fields in General tab; (2) Pricing tab has 6 pricing types with conditional UI (VariantEditor for tiered, PriceInputsEditor for calculator); (3) Store shows correct labels: 'Starts from $X' for tiered/calculator, 'from $X' for fixed, 'Contact us' for inquiry/scope_request; (4) prod_migrate_books deleted; (5) No BooksMigrationForm on product detail. Minor issue: card_description and card_tag don't actually override their counterparts in OfferingCard (ordering bug). Test products with TEST_ prefix exist in CRM and Finance categories.

card_description_override_bug.impact: Admin-set card_description is never shown if short_description is set - the override has no effect

card_tag_override_bug.current: if (product.tag) return product.tag; if (product.card_tag) return product.card_tag;
card_tag_override_bug.fix: if (product.card_tag) return product.card_tag; if (product.tag) return product.tag;
card_tag_override_bug.impact: Admin-set card_tag is never shown if tag is set - the override has no effect
